approvalSource: Steve approved unattended Foundation-only continuation; SOURCE-018 closes the Google Gemini meeting notes contract before current-day extraction work.
scopeSummary: Sign off SRC-MEETINGS-001 for current Foundation/Steve owner use only, with governed current-day meeting-note archive proof, transcript evidence boundary, privacy/read-side controls, no Drive permission mutation, and no broad raw transcript/team/agent access approval.
